inputs.prompt: Performance report and refactor targets with constraints
inputs.context: Pipeline context including benchmarks, failing tests, and code ownership boundaries

outputs.primary: Minimal safe refactors and optimizations with before/after evidence
outputs.format: Change summary, impacted files, verification results, and rollback notes

failure_handling.on_regression: Revert or adjust until tests pass; keep changes minimal and targeted
failure_handling.on_unclear_ownership: Escalate to Architect/Task Router; do not rewrite unrelated modules
